targets.expr: sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (sglang:num_running_reqs{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"})
sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (sglang:gen_throughput{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name",engine_type=~"decode|unified"})

(sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))) / clamp_min((sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_miss_tokens_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-9)

sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min((sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_miss_tokens_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-9)

sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min((sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_miss_tokens_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-9)

sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min((sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_miss_tokens_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-9)

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate (分层)
panels.description: 分层 Cache 命中率。总命中率 = (L1+L2+L3) / (L1+L2+L3+Miss)。各层占比使用无 page 对齐的原始 token 数。

targets.expr: sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (sglang:num_queue_reqs{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"})

panels.description: Host 层 KV cache 使用率 (0–1)。仅当启用 HiCache 时有数据。
panels.title: HiCache Host 使用率

panels.description: Host 层已用 / 总容量 (tokens)。仅当启用 HiCache 时有数据。
panels.title: HiCache Host 已用 / 总容量 (tokens)

panels.description: L3 存储层预取与回写速率（tokens/s）：预取 (L3→Host DRAM)，回写 (Host DRAM→L3)。
panels.title: HiCache L3 预取 / 回写速率 (Host↔Storage)

panels.description: L1 (GPU) KV cache 淘汰与加载回速率（tokens/s）：淘汰（无 HiCache 时丢弃，有 HiCache 时写入 L2），以及从 L2 (Host) 加载回 GPU。
panels.title: HiCache L1↔L2 淘汰 / 加载回 GPU 速率

panels.description: 命中缓存的 token 速率 (tokens/s)，含 HiCache 命中。
panels.title: Cached Tokens 速率 (命中 token/s)

panels.description: GPU KV cache 使用率 (0–1)。高时 HiCache 更易发挥作用。

targets.expr: avg without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (sglang:gpu_kv_cache_occupancy{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name",engine_type=~"decode|unified"})
avg without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (sglang:token_usage{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name",engine_type=~"decode|unified"})

panels.title: GPU KV Cache 使用率

panels.description: L1→L2 PCIe 写入带宽分布（logical KV bytes / CUDA event 耗时），单位 GB/s。反映 GPU→Host 真实传输速率。
panels.title: HiCache L1→L2 PCIe 写入带宽 (GB/s)

panels.description: L2→L1 PCIe 加载带宽分布（logical KV bytes / CUDA event 耗时），单位 GB/s。反映 Host→GPU 真实传输速率。
panels.title: HiCache L2→L1 PCIe 加载带宽 (GB/s)

panels.description: L2→L1 加载关键路径延迟：前向计算流等待 Host→GPU 传输完成的累计时间（不与计算重叠的部分）。值越低越好，0 表示完全重叠。
panels.title: HiCache L2→L1 Forward Stall (Critical Path)

panels.description: L3 Storage 读写带宽。Write = Host→Storage (backup)，Read = Storage→Host (prefetch)。
panels.title: HiCache L3 Storage 读写带宽

panels.description: L3 prefetch effectiveness: fraction of prefetched tokens that were actually used as L3 cache hits (cache_hit_tokens_l3_total / prefetched_tokens_total). A value of 1.0 means every prefetched token was reused; lower values indicate early termination (best_effort) or wasted prefetch bandwidth.
panels.title: HiCache L3 Prefetch Effectiveness

panels.description: L3 prefetch latency. Total = full async duration from PrefetchOperation enqueue to IO aux thread finishing _page_transfer. Critical path = unoverlapped tail; the portion of the async prefetch that ran after the scheduler first observed it as not-yet-terminable. Critical path is always <= Total; the gap between them is the latency hidden by async overlap. Policy semantics: under wait_complete and timeout, both lines are meaningful. Under best_effort, Total has no samples (scheduler can't see true completion from the polling side) and Critical path is always 0 (scheduler never waits) — expect this panel to look empty/zero in best_effort mode.
panels.title: HiCache L3 Prefetch Latency (Total vs Critical Path)

panels.description: Effective L3 prefetch bandwidth observed on the scheduler critical path: prefetched bytes / critical-path duration, in GB/s. Only sampled when critical_path > 0 (scheduler actually blocked on the prefetch) — always empty under best_effort. Critical_path starts at first_poll (possibly after I/O began) and ends at complete_time, so this is an upper bound on true backend throughput.
panels.title: HiCache L3 Prefetch Critical-Path Bandwidth

panels.description: Stacked share of the L3 prefetch critical path by stage. Each line is rate(stage_seconds_sum) / rate(critical_path_seconds_sum), so the four stages sum to 100% of the unoverlapped critical path. Stages: queue-wait (op sitting in prefetch_queue before lookup thread picks it up), hit-query (_storage_hit_query: hashing + batch_exists + TP all_reduce), io-queue-wait (op sitting in prefetch_buffer between threads), io-transfer (_page_transfer: batched batch_get + host memcpy). Empty under best_effort (critical_path is always 0).
panels.title: HiCache L3 Prefetch Critical-Path Stage Breakdown

panels.description: Stacked average duration of the L3 prefetch critical path by stage, in seconds (per entire PrefetchOperation — already spans all internal storage_batch_size sub-batches inside _storage_hit_query and _page_transfer). Each line is rate(stage_seconds_sum) / rate(critical_path_seconds_count), so the four stages stack additively to the average critical_path_seconds per request. Stages: queue_wait (op in prefetch_queue), hit_query (_storage_hit_query: hashing + batch_exists + TP all_reduce, looped over batches internally), io_queue_wait (op in prefetch_buffer between threads), io_transfer (_page_transfer: looped batch_get + host memcpy). Empty under best_effort (critical_path is always 0).
panels.title: HiCache L3 Prefetch Critical-Path Stage Duration (Avg per request)

panels.description: Mori-io RDMA tail latency per P-D pair (instance = prefill server, decode_endpoint = decode server). Each line is one prefill→decode path.
panels.title: PD Transfer - Mori RDMA Latency (ms)

panels.description: Mori-io RDMA bandwidth per P-D pair (last-chunk bytes / tail latency). Each line is one prefill→decode path.
panels.title: PD Transfer - Mori RDMA Bandwidth (GB/s)

panels.description: P50 latency of each PD transfer phase. bootstrap/alloc/e2e are cluster-wide; mori RDMA is per decode endpoint so you can compare across P-D pairs.
panels.title: PD Transfer - Latency Breakdown (P50, ms)

panels.description: Distribution of KV cache payload size per PD transfer request.
panels.title: PD Transfer - Transfer Size (MB)
